item.title: DOJ struggles as White House presses on voter fraud
item.description: Efforts to prosecute noncitizen voters have been slowed by lack of evidence, officials say, while Trump aides push for a broader crackdown.

item.title: Democrat wants DHS to examine potential bias in Minneapolis investigations
item.description: Sen. Maggie Hassan (D-New Hampshire) asked the Department of Homeland Security’s inspector general to look into the impact of accusations that Renée G...

item.title: Veterans sue over Trump’s planned 250-foot arch, citing cemetery views
item.description: The Vietnam War veterans, who later worked as U.S. diplomats, say that the arch would harm the experience of visiting nearby Arlington National Cemete...

item.title: Trump says he will release government files on alien life, UFOs
item.description: The president’s announcement came after he rebuked his predecessor Barack Obama for saying that aliens were “real.” Obama later said he was just guess...

item.title: In rare move, Veterans Affairs pulls back on controversial disability rule
item.description: Veterans groups had warned that the change would have disadvantaged veterans who need medication.
